title: Performant Petals
description: Makes Pink Petals and Wildflowers less laggy.
body:
This pack changes the block model of flowerbed-type blocks to use FAR fewer elements. The default block model has up to 34 faces, whereas mine only has 1.

![Pack On vs Pack Off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7415fe9f728ce01c7108b09dec1376329fd8d33e.png)
